_meta.policy: DeepSeek triage is advisory only. It authorizes no ISIN, country, name, or scope change without official listing-keyed evidence.

items.evidence_needed: Official documentation confirming ISIN assignment for both ETFs.
items.rationale: The TSX listing is a Canadian-domiciled Global X ETF matching the ISIN's country code (CA). The NYSE ARCA listing is a US-domiciled ProShares ETF, a different issuer and product.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Confirm correct ISINs for all OTC-listed Malaysian/other companies and verify Weyerhaeuser's ISIN.
items.rationale: Weyerhaeuser is a US company consistent with ISIN country code. All OTC listings are unrelated Malaysian (and other) companies, clearly misassigned.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Verify HelloFresh SE ISIN assignment and correct ISIN for Hilton Food Group plc.
items.rationale: HelloFresh SE is a German company matching the ISIN country. Hilton Food Group is a UK-based firm, distinct from HelloFresh.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Confirm ISIN assignment for iShares MSCI ACWI UCITS ETF and correct ISIN for SPACSphere Acquisition Corp.
items.rationale: The iShares ETF is an Irish-domiciled UCITS ETF matching the ISIN country code. The NASDAQ listing is a SPAC, clearly a different issuer.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Official ISIN registration details to confirm the correct fund name and index tracked; current mismatch between 'Ibovespa' and 'MSCI Brazil' suggests different securities.
items.rationale: The ISIN is linked to a Lyxor Brazil ETF. LSE listings match typical name 'Lyxor UCITS Brazil (Ibovespa) C-EUR'. SIX/XETRA listings reference 'MSCI Brazil', a different index, likely a separate ETF. OTC::BRANF is an unrelated company. Hence, distinct issuers.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Confirm ISIN registration for Universal Music Group N.V. versus New Zealand Coastal Seafoods.
items.rationale: All but OTC::NZSCF correspond to Universal Music Group, a Dutch music company. OTC::NZSCF is a seafood company, clearly unrelated.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Official ISIN data for Mastercard Inc; confirm ASX:MA1 and LSE:MAST are unrelated trusts/companies.
items.rationale: ISIN US57636Q1040 is widely known as Mastercard Inc. ASX::MA1 is a credit income trust, and LSE::MAST is an energy developments company, both unrelated.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Verify ISIN assignment for Liberty Gold Corp vs PGG Wrightson.
items.rationale: The ISIN is for Liberty Gold Corp, a Canadian mining company. OTC::PGWFF corresponds to PGG Wrightson, a New Zealand agricultural firm, unrelated.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Official ISIN assignment records for CA8119161054.
items.rationale: Seabridge Gold Inc. is a Canadian gold mining company. Banco Santander is a Spanish bank, and Sanford Limited is a New Zealand seafood company. The ISIN is Canadian, so likely belongs to Seabridge Gold.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

items.evidence_needed: Official ISIN assignment records for CH0445689208.
items.rationale: 21Shares Crypto Basket Index ETP is a Swiss exchange-traded product. VanEck Bitcoin Trust is a US ETF managed by VanEck. They are distinct issuers. The ISIN is Swiss, so likely belongs to 21Shares.
items.review_gate: Triage only. Do not change, blank, or reassign any ISIN, country, or name until official listing-keyed identifier evidence confirms the holder.

summary.policy: DeepSeek triage is advisory only and authorizes no ISIN, country, or name change. Official listing-keyed identifier evidence remains required.
